ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Kathryn Heaven (Petitioner) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The Court asked Ms. Heaven if she plans to keep the real property during the administration of this estate. Ms. Heaven stated that she thinks it is prudent to hold on to the property. The Court raised the issue of Ms. Heaven having limited authority and noted that the bond would be substantially lower. Ms. Heaven stated that she could live with that. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Kathryn Poblocki Heaven is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $27,000.00. Michael Kasolas is the appointed Probate Referee. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for September 22, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for May 11, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is to be filed by that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Carranza. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Continued To Apr-21-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
